privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic product data created during Magento environment initialization. The target product is SKU 'LAPTOP-001' named 'Business Laptop Pro' created via REST API (verified in setup_magento.sh line 281). The task expects the AI agent to set the product's SEO properties to: URL Key 'business-laptop-pro-2025', Meta Title 'Business Laptop Pro 15-inch | Enterprise Edition', and Meta Description 'Upgrade your workflow with the Business Laptop Pro. Featuring 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and all-day battery life. Free shipping on orders over $500.' These metadata values are template SEO values not derived from product database attributes. All four metadata claims are verified as exactly stated in task.json.
